assertions.assertion: Explains that claims must be declared in the UserClaims collection of an IdentityResource, ApiScope, or ApiResource
assertions.rationale: Mentions claims need to be associated with a scope or resource and shows UserClaims

assertions.assertion: Shows adding 'department' to the UserClaims collection on the relevant ApiScope or ApiResource
Mentions that the client must also request the scope that contains the claim
assertions.rationale: Shows AllowedScopes and mentions client must request the scope

assertions.assertion: Explains the relationship between AddRequestedClaims and RequestedClaimTypes — AddRequestedClaims filters to only requested claim types
assertions.rationale: Does not explain AddRequestedClaims or RequestedClaimTypes filtering mechanism at all
